title: EBTA execution journal event
description: One event in the signal->order->fill->position->P&L chain. The full journal must be reconstructible for audit. Source: SOP 09B; DN-028; PAQUET D'EXECUTION section 4 (rapport d'execution).
x_normative_source: Protocole/PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md section 4; SOP 09B sections 3, 16, 17, 32; DN-028, DN-029

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution journal entry.

fold_id.description: Fold this event belongs to (Train_k, Test_k, OOS_k).

signal_id.description: Reference to the trading signal that triggered this event.

order_id.description: Reference to the order generated from the signal.

fill_status.description: Fill outcome. REJECTED and MISSED_OPPORTUNITY must be logged (G6 checklist).

fill_id.description: Reference to the fill record; null if not filled.

position_id.description: Reference to the resulting position; null if flat.

costs.description: Total costs: spread, commission, impact, borrow, financing, FX (DN-028).

net_pnl.description: Net P&L = gross_pnl - costs. Must reconcile with NAV change.

nav_before.description: Portfolio NAV at start of this event.

nav_after.description: Portfolio NAV after this event (must equal nav_before + net_pnl).

execution_model_id.description: Reference to the preregistered execution model (central scenario, DN-028).

cost_breakdown.description: Optional itemised cost breakdown (spread, commission, impact, borrow, financing, fx).

rejection_reason.description: Required when fill_status is REJECTED or MISSED_OPPORTUNITY.
